entry.data:
SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 60S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
